message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'dmamove_job_submit' sets signal field 'dmamove_job.status', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=dmamove_job;field=status;offset=140] [oracle:assert=dmamove_job.status stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets status without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
